entries.original: **CCG CLI-First Path** — Skill nesting is unsupported in Claude Code; CCG now routes advisor calls through the CLI path instead. (#1662)
entries.translated: 상대 경로 검증을 통한 경로 탐색 보호 강화 및 회귀 테스트 추가 (#1642)

entries.original: **Team Runtime Enhancements** — Backported 6 OMX team runtime improvements including worker stability, mailbox handling, shell affinity, and allocation policies. (#1658, #1540)
entries.translated: LSP 클라이언트 시작 및 종료의 안정성 개선 (#1644)

entries.original: **Ralph/Ralplan Hook Fix** — Stop hooks now correctly resume ralph/ralplan iterations instead of halting prematurely. (#1660)
entries.translated: Python REPL 브리지 프로세스 관리의 견고성 강화 (#1643)

entries.original: **Deep-Interview Convergence** — Added ontology convergence tracking inspired by Q00/ouroboros for mathematical ambiguity gating. (#1657)
entries.translated: tmux 세션 생성 및 종료의 안전성 강화 (#1641)

entries.original: **feat(team): backport 6 OMX team runtime enhancements** — Brings team worker stability, mailbox handling, shell affinity, and allocation improvements from OMX upstream. (#1658, #1540)
entries.translated: 의존성 보안 감사 수정 사항 반영 (#1645)

entries.original: **feat(deep-interview): add ontology convergence tracking** — Inspired by Q00/ouroboros, adds mathematical convergence metrics to deep-interview sessions. (#1657)
entries.translated: git commit heredoc 사용 시 Claude의 ask 규칙을 준수하여 권한 확인 우회 방지 (#1651, #1652)

entries.original: **fix(ccg): use CLI-first path for ask advisors** — Skill nesting is unsupported in Claude Code; CCG now routes advisor calls through the CLI path instead. (#1662)
entries.translated: Windows 플랫폼에서 ask CLI 수정을 위해 프롬프트를 stdin으로 전달 (#1648, #1649)

entries.original: **fix(hooks): fix ralph/ralplan stop hook not auto-continuing** — Stop hooks now correctly resume ralph/ralplan iterations instead of halting. (#1660)
entries.translated: 훅 출력을 숨기기 위한 새로운 환경 변수 `OMC_QUIET` 추가 (#1646, #1647)

entries.original: **fix: remove dead code from deprecated features** — Cleaned up unused code paths from previously deprecated functionality. (#1659)
entries.translated: 메시지 처리 후 워커가 조기에 종료되지 않도록 개선 (#1619, #1624, #1640)

entries.original: **5 PRs merged** | **2 new features** | **3 bug fixes**
entries.translated: 워커 생성 시 사용자가 설정한 쉘 설정을 유지하도록 개선 (#1622, #1625)
